item.title: UK’s Bridgepoint nears deal to buy real estate unit in bet on US property
item.description: London-based buyout group is looking beyond its traditional speciality in corporate buyouts

item.title: US insurance rulemaker suspends investment risk designations after cyber attack
item.description: Ratings help determine how much capital insurers must have to meet obligations to policyholders

item.title: German carmakers embark on historic job cuts as Chinese rivals flood market
item.description: Threat to industrial model of Europe’s largest economy mounts

item.title: QuidelOrtho looks to sell testing unit as PE circles healthcare companies
item.description: Diagnostic company’s shares are down 90% since its rapid antigen tests were the first to be approved for Covid-19

item.title: Chipmakers are expensive globally
item.description: Valuations are high for AI-exposed markets

item.title: Football’s stealthy super league
item.description: Also in today’s newsletter, the PGA Tour’s revamp, and Elliott Hill on fixing Nike

item.title: Owner of car searched by police after Beijing tower plane crash identified
item.description: Vehicle was at airfield from where aircraft that hit Citic Tower took off

item.title: EasyJet’s top shareholders hold out for £5.3bn bid from Castlelake
item.description: Many large investors agree that private credit group’s offer must reach £7 per share

item.title: Luxury may be in the doldrums, but perfume passes the smell test
item.description: Fragrances are among the faster-growing areas of the beauty industry — though investing in them isn’t straightforward

item.title: Baltic states urge EU to speed up ban on Russian oil imports
item.description: Talks about the phaseout stalled after the closure of the Strait of Hormuz sparked concerns of an energy supply crisis

item.title: Ocado major shareholders mount rearguard action to save CEO Tim Steiner
item.description: Multiple investors oppose plans led by chair Adam Warby and Tetra Pak billionaire board member Jörn Rausing to oust co-founder

item.title: Extreme heat elevates national security risk at London climate week
item.description: Focus shifts to physical dangers as well as energy security as temperatures break fresh records

item.title: Indian snack giant Haldiram’s cooks up European expansion
item.description: Temasek-backed company opens first UK restaurant in London’s Leicester Square

item.title: The struggle over Wimbledon’s finances
item.description: The cost of running the prestigious tournament has risen significantly and players want a greater share of revenues

item.title: Utility boss warns US faces blackouts due to power supply shortfall
item.description: Exelon chief executive says electricity bill increases are necessary to fund infrastructure to support AI boom

item.title: Dubai travel ban targeting MFS owner Paresh Raja lifted
item.description: Administrators to failed bridging loan provider have accused Raja of plundering at least £1.3bn

item.title: Apple seeks to buy memory chips from blacklisted Chinese company
item.description: The iPhone maker wants Trump administration to sign off on purchases to ease pressure from rising chip prices

item.title: Trump administration allows some access to Anthropic’s Mythos
item.description: Move eases tension with AI lab but unease over Washington’s ad hoc regulatory approach remains

item.title: SpaceX bonds sell off days after AI and rocket group’s $25bn debt deal
item.description: Yields move towards levels commonly associated with junk-rated companies

item.title: S&P 500 notches longest losing streak in 10 months as chipmakers slide
item.description: Software stock-led recovery proves fleeting as Wall Street’s main indices fall for fifth consecutive session

item.title: EU border checks hit by late kit and sweaty scanners
item.description: Airports warn system could cause travel chaos during summer holiday season

item.title: Hong Kong billionaire explores sale of Harvey Nichols
item.description: Struggling luxury department store owned by Sir Dickson Poon is in active talks with multiple parties over a deal

item.title: Trump warns of 100% tariff on countries implementing digital services tax
item.description: US president says levy would supersede any trade deals Washington has with other capitals

item.title: Stockpickers: Babcock International, Telecom Plus, Moonpig
item.description: Our experts discuss which companies to buy, sell or hold this week

item.title: Directors’ Deals: Dr Martens boss backs new strategy as a better fit
item.description: Group broadens footwear offering to curb its reliance on boots

item.title: Ill-timed deregulation is weakening bank resilience
item.description: Thoughtful, fundamental reform is needed in finance, not an industry checklist

item.title: OpenAI releases GPT-5.6 to select users vetted by US government
item.description: San Francisco-based company announces ‘limited preview’ of new models with powerful cyber security capabilities

item.title: What Kevin Warsh can learn from Alan Greenspan
item.description: The new Fed chair must learn from his late predecessor’s successes — and avoid his mistakes

item.title: Britain backs electricity storage projects as heatwave strains grid
item.description: Provisional approval of battery and hydropower projects comes after high temperatures reduce gas and solar generation

item.title: Small plane crashes into Beijing’s tallest building
item.description: Debris seen falling from Citic Tower after propeller aircraft hits skyscraper in Chinese capital’s central business district
